included.text: Daily breakfast and regional dinner meals
Local experienced driver and sightseeing guide
Private air-conditioned transfers for the entire route

itinerary.title: Arrival in Hyderabad & Historic Landmarks
itinerary.description: Arrive in Hyderabad. Check into your hotel and set off to explore the iconic Charminar, Mecca Masjid, and the bustling Laad Bazaar.

itinerary.title: Full Day at Ramoji Film City
itinerary.description: Spend a full day exploring the cinematic magic of Ramoji Film City, featuring spectacular movie sets, action shows, and themed parks.

itinerary.title: Golconda Fort & Travel to Hogenakkal
itinerary.description: Tour the acoustic ruins of Golconda Fort and the Qutb Shahi Tombs. Later in the afternoon, proceed on your journey toward Hogenakkal.

itinerary.title: Coracle Ride at Hogenakkal Falls & Drive to Coorg
itinerary.description: Marvel at the roaring Kaveri river cascades and enjoy a thrilling traditional coracle boat ride. In the afternoon, drive to the misty hills of Coorg.

itinerary.title: Coorg Valleys, Abbey Falls & Raja's Seat
itinerary.description: Explore Coorg's natural beauty. Visit Abbey Falls, the historic Madikeri Fort, and watch a gorgeous sunset from the hilltop at Raja's Seat.

itinerary.title: Bylakuppe Golden Temple & Departure
itinerary.description: Visit the peaceful Namdroling Monastery (Golden Temple) in Bylakuppe and walk through local coffee estates before transferring for your departure.

title: Coorg, Hyderabad & Hogenakkal: Hills, Heritage & Waterfalls
description: Experience the cool mist of Coorg's coffee valleys, the royal Nizami charm and film city attractions of Hyderabad, and the roaring, Kaveri river cascades of Hogenakkal waterfalls. A complete tour of Central and Southern India.
highlights: Spend a full day exploring the grand sets of Ramoji Film City
Explore Coorg's Abbey Falls, Golden Temple, and Raja's Seat
Experience a traditional coracle ride at Hogenakkal Falls
Tour the historic Charminar and Golconda Fort in Hyderabad
